MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-17-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCE:
Joseph Malton, 212.249.9000 of Matalon PLLC appearing via Zoom for Plaintiff 152 Geary St. LLC.
Roey Rahmil, 415.421.6500 of Sartsis Friese LLP appearing ai Zoom for Plaintiff 152 Geary St. LLC.
Theodore Spanos, 818, 827.9241 of Brutzkus Gubner, LLP appearing via Court call for Defendants Vijaya Properties, LLC and Interurban Capital Group, Inc.

Mr. Spansos counsel for the Defendants submits. The matter is argued by the Plaintiff. The Court does not rule on the objections.
The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF 152 GEARY ST. LLC, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is DENIED. Moving party moved for a summary judgment claiming entitlement to a judgment of $8,237,572.96 against Vijaya Properties LLC and Interurban Capital Group, Inc. In reply, Plaintiff attempts to sidestep the issue of damages by seeking only $6,961,657.83 judgement, plus daily damages (Note: the relevant portions of the reply brief are devoid of any authority Reply 6:10-21). The motions are framed by the Notice of Motion. Here, Plaintiff appears to have abandoned its original request as framed by the Notice in an effort to avoid a triable issue of fact. (Reply 2:3-6). Motion for summary judgment was filed on August 9, 2021, 9 months after $1,050,000 was applied to unpaid rent under the Lease. (Levin Declaration, paragraph 8). Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
